full_text:
Yang Huai 楊懷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Huai (楊懷). Officer of Liu Zhang. Executed after an attempt to assassinate Liu Bei. Yang Huai was affiliated with Liu Zhang. Yang Huai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
